member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour`2
member.summary:
MediatR pipeline behaviour that logs the start, completion, and elapsed time of every command and query. Uses structured logging via Serilog-compatible .
Logs a warning when any handler takes longer than milliseconds.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour`2.WarningThresholdMs
member.summary: Handlers slower than this threshold trigger a Warning-level log.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour`2.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.LoggingBehaviour{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Initialises the behaviour with a logger.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.ValidationBehaviour`2
member.summary:
MediatR pipeline behaviour that runs all registered instances for the incoming request before the handler executes.
Returns when validation fails rather than throwing, keeping the Result pattern clean across layer boundaries.
member.typeparam: The handler response type (must be or subclass).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.ValidationBehaviour`2.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FluentValidation.IValidator{`0}},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Behaviours.ValidationBehaviour{`0,`1}})
member.summary: Initialises the behaviour with all registered validators for the request.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Exceptions.ForbiddenAccessException
member.summary: Thrown by command handlers when the current user does not hold the required permission to perform the requested operation. Translated to a user-friendly error dialog in the WPF UI.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Exceptions.ForbiddenAccessException.RequiredPermission
member.summary: The permission code that was required but not held.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown by query handlers when a requested entity does not exist or has been soft-deleted. Translated to a user-friendly message in the UI.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Exceptions.NotFoundException.EntityName
member.summary: The entity type that was not found.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Exceptions.NotFoundException.Key
member.summary: The key used to look up the entity.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.WorkflowResult
member.summary: Encapsulates workflow outcomes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.WorkflowResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Guid,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Encapsulates workflow outcomes.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IApprovalEngine
member.summary: Service coordinating multi-tier workflow approvals for master records.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IApprovalEngine.SubmitAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Submits a change request for review, transitioning it to Submitted status.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IApprovalEngine.ApproveAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Approves a pending change request.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IApprovalEngine.RejectAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Rejects a pending change request.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICorrelationContext
member.summary: Holds the transaction correlation tracking ID for the current scope.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICorrelationContext.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation ID of the current scope.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService
member.summary: Provides the identity of the currently authenticated application user. Injected into command handlers to stamp audit fields and enforce company isolation. Implemented in the WPF presentation layer via the active login session.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService.UserId
member.summary: The database primary key of the authenticated user. Returns 0 for unauthenticated/system operations (e.g., seed jobs).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService.Username
member.summary: The username (login name) of the authenticated user. Never null; returns "System" for background jobs.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService.CompanyIds
member.summary: All company IDs that the authenticated user is authorised to access. Empty for a user with no company access.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService.Permissions
member.summary: All permission codes granted to this user via their role assignments.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService.HasPermission(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the user holds the specified permission code.
member.param: Permission code from PermissionConstants.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService.HasCompanyAccess(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if the user is authorised to access the specified company.
member.param: The company primary key.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IDateTimeService
member.summary: Provides the current UTC date and time, abstracted for testability. Implementations inject DateTime.UtcNow in production and a fixed value in unit tests.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IDateTimeService.UtcNow
member.summary: Current date and time in UTC.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IDateTimeService.Today
member.summary: Current date in UTC (time portion stripped).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IEventBus
member.summary: Abstraction for publishing and subscribing to in-memory domain events. Decouples event dispatching from operational transactions.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IEventBus.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes an event asynchronously to all registered handlers.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IEventBus.Subscribe``1(System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Registers an event listener action.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IFileStorageProvider
member.summary: Contract for storing and retrieving files from local folders, UNC network shares, or cloud storage.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IFileStorageProvider.SaveFileAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves a file stream to storage and returns the resulting storage path/URL.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IFileStorageProvider.GetFileAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a read stream of a file from storage.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IFileStorageProvider.DeleteFileAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a file from storage.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ImportError
member.summary: Detailed validation error entry for import pipelines.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ImportError.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detailed validation error entry for import pipelines.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ImportValidationResult
member.summary: Result of an import parsing and validation pass.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ImportValidationResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ImportError})
member.summary: Result of an import parsing and validation pass.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IImportEngine
member.summary: Handles spreadsheet import/export operations, column mappings, validation loops, and atomic transactions.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IImportEngine.GenerateTemplateAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates an Excel import template file stream for lookups and employees data entry.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IImportEngine.ValidateImportAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Parses an imported file and returns verification and validation rules reports.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IImportEngine.CommitImportAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the temporary imported database records to the primary master schema.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IModulePlugin
member.summary: Defines the startup contract for modular system plugins. Plugins register dependencies and execute db schema updates during initialization.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IModulePlugin.ModuleName
member.summary: Unique name of the plugin.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IModulePlugin.Version
member.summary: Semantic version number.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IModulePlugin.RegisterServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers plugin-specific dependencies in the main DI container.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IModulePlugin.InitializeDatabaseAsync(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Executes initial data migrations or database seedings using the resolved scope.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IReferenceDataCache
member.summary: Interface for a thread-safe, memory-cached lookup reference data service. Reduces database queries for static lookup fields during high load.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IReferenceDataCache.GetLookupsByCategoryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves cached lookup items for a specific category within the current tenant context.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IReferenceDataCache.GetLookupByCodeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single cached lookup item by its unique category and code.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IReferenceDataCache.InvalidateCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Clears cache blocks for a specific category.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IReferenceDataCache.InvalidateAll
member.summary: Clears all cached reference items.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.SearchResult
member.summary: Model for ranked fuzzy search outcomes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.SearchResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Model for ranked fuzzy search outcomes.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISearchService
member.summary: Contract for multi-entity fuzzy text search. Indexing updates can be performed in the background; searches return ranked results.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISearchService.IndexEntityAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates or inserts the search terms for an entity in the index.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISearchService.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches the index, applying weighted ranking and fuzzy term queries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IStatutoryProvider
member.summary: Contract for versioned, time-bound statutory compliance rules (PAYE tax, FNPF).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IStatutoryProvider.RuleVersion
member.summary: Unique name/version code of the rule engine.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IStatutoryProvider.EffectiveFrom
member.summary: The start of the calculation rule validity period.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IStatutoryProvider.EffectiveTo
member.summary: The end of the calculation rule validity period.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IStatutoryProvider.CalculatePaye(System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Calculates the Pay-As-You-Earn (PAYE) withholding tax according to FRCS rules.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IStatutoryProvider.CalculateFnpf(System.Decimal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculates the Fiji National Provident Fund (FNPF) contribution.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider
member.summary: Service supplying context for the currently authenticated tenant/company. Used to enforce database query filters and data isolation constraints.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider.GetCurrentCompanyId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the current active company tenant.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider.GetCurrentTenantSecurityKey
member.summary: Gets the security isolation key for the current active tenant.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.MediatRNotificationWrapper`1
member.summary: Wrapper to allow any plain domain event object to be published as a MediatR INotification.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.MediatRNotificationWrapper`1.Event
member.summary: Gets the underlying domain event.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.MediatRNotificationWrapper`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Initializes the wrapper.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1
member.summary: Model representing paginated query results with metadata for grid display in the WPF UI. Used to enforce server-side pagination.
member.typeparam: The DTO type of each page item.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.Items
member.summary: The items on the current page.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.PageNumber
member.summary: The 1-based current page number.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.PageSize
member.summary: Maximum items per page.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of records matching the query (across all pages).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: true if there is a page before the current one.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: true if there is a page after the current one.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PagedResult`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{`0},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialises a paged result.

member.summary: Carries paginated query results with metadata for grid display in the WPF UI.
member.typeparam: The DTO type of each page item.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PaginatedList`1.Items
member.summary: The items on the current page.

member.summary: The 1-based current page number.

member.summary: Maximum items per page.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PaginatedList`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of records matching the query (across all pages).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PaginatedList`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PaginatedList`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: true if there is a page before the current one.

member.summary: Initialises a paginated list.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.PaginatedList`1.Create(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a from an in-memory sequence. Use for small datasets; for large datasets use the database-paged overload.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result
member.summary: Generic result type used as the return value for all Application layer operations. Avoids exceptions crossing layer boundaries. Commands return , queries return .

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Initialises a new result.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.IsSuccess
member.summary: true when the operation completed successfully without errors.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.IsFailure
member.summary: true when the operation produced one or more errors.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.Errors
member.summary: Collection of error messages. Empty when is true.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.Error
member.summary: Convenience accessor — first error message, or empty string.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.Success
member.summary: Creates a successful .

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.Failure(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed with a single error message.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result.Failure(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a failed with multiple error messages.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result`1
member.summary: Generic result type carrying a value payload on success. Used by query handlers to return data without throwing exceptions.
member.typeparam: The type of the returned value.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result`1.Value
member.summary: The returned value. Only valid when is true. Accessing this when is true throws.
member.exception: Thrown if result is a failure.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result`1.Success(`0)
member.summary: Creates a successful carrying a value.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result`1.Failure(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed with a single error message.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Models.Result`1.Failure(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a failed with multiple error messages.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Extension methods to register all Application layer services with the dependency injection container. Called from the WPF composition root.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.DependencyInjection.AddApplication(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers MediatR, FluentValidation, and all MediatR pipeline behaviours defined in the Application layer.
member.param: The service collection to register into.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.Lookups.Queries.GetLookups.GetLookupsQueryHandler.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider)

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand
member.summary:
Command to create a new payroll component for a company. Sent by the PayrollComponentFormViewModel in the WPF UI.
Validation is enforced by via the MediatR pipeline before the handler executes.
member.param: The owning company (must match current user's access).
Unique uppercase code for the company. Max 20 chars.
Human-readable name displayed on payslips. Max 200 chars.
Classification: Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, Statutory.
Fixed, Percentage, Formula, or Manual.
Dollar amount or % value. Required for Fixed and Percentage methods.
Formula expression. Required for Formula method.
Whether this component contributes to PAYE taxable income.
Whether this component contributes to FNPF-applicable gross.
Non-negative sort order on payslips.
Optional internal description. Max 500 chars.

member.summary:
Command to create a new payroll component for a company. Sent by the PayrollComponentFormViewModel in the WPF UI.
Validation is enforced by via the MediatR pipeline before the handler executes.
member.param: The owning company (must match current user's access).
Unique uppercase code for the company. Max 20 chars.
Human-readable name displayed on payslips. Max 200 chars.
Classification: Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, Statutory.
Fixed, Percentage, Formula, or Manual.
Dollar amount or % value. Required for Fixed and Percentage methods.
Formula expression. Required for Formula method.
Whether this component contributes to PAYE taxable income.
Whether this component contributes to FNPF-applicable gross.
Non-negative sort order on payslips.
Optional internal description. Max 500 chars.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.CompanyId
member.summary: The owning company (must match current user's access).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.ComponentCode
member.summary: Unique uppercase code for the company. Max 20 chars.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.ComponentName
member.summary: Human-readable name displayed on payslips. Max 200 chars.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.ComponentType
member.summary: Classification: Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, Statutory.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Fixed, Percentage, Formula, or Manual.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.CalculationValue
member.summary: Dollar amount or % value. Required for Fixed and Percentage methods.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.Formula
member.summary: Formula expression. Required for Formula method.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.IsTaxable
member.summary: Whether this component contributes to PAYE taxable income.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.IsFnpfApplicable
member.summary: Whether this component contributes to FNPF-applicable gross.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Non-negative sort order on payslips.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommand.Description
member.summary: Optional internal description. Max 500 chars.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommandHandler
member.summary:
Handles .
Steps:
Verify the user holds .
Verify the user has access to the target company.
Check the component code is unique within the company.
Create the domain entity via .
Persist via Unit of Work.
Return the new component's .
Initialises the handler with its dependencies.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommandValidator
member.summary: FluentValidation validator for . Enforces UI-level rules as defined in Phase05-Configuration.md §9.2 and domain-level rules from Database.md §5.6.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.CreatePayrollComponent.CreatePayrollComponentCommandValidator.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises all validation rules.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DeletePayrollComponent.DeletePayrollComponentCommand
member.summary: Command to soft-delete a payroll component. System components are protected and will return a failure result. Components used in any payroll run detail records will also be protected.
member.param: Primary key of the component to delete.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DeletePayrollComponent.DeletePayrollComponentCommand.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Command to soft-delete a payroll component. System components are protected and will return a failure result. Components used in any payroll run detail records will also be protected.
member.param: Primary key of the component to delete.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DeletePayrollComponent.DeletePayrollComponentCommand.Id
member.summary: Primary key of the component to delete.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DeletePayrollComponent.DeletePayrollComponentCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles . Enforces that system components and in-use components cannot be deleted.
Initialises the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DuplicatePayrollComponent.DuplicatePayrollComponentCommand
member.summary: Command to create a copy of an existing payroll component with a new code and name. The duplicate will have IsSystemComponent = false and will be active.
member.param: Primary key of the component to clone.
Unique code for the new component. Max 20 chars, uppercase.
Display name for the new component. Max 200 chars.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DuplicatePayrollComponent.DuplicatePayrollComponentCommand.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Command to create a copy of an existing payroll component with a new code and name. The duplicate will have IsSystemComponent = false and will be active.
member.param: Primary key of the component to clone.
Unique code for the new component. Max 20 chars, uppercase.
Display name for the new component. Max 200 chars.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DuplicatePayrollComponent.DuplicatePayrollComponentCommand.SourceId
member.summary: Primary key of the component to clone.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DuplicatePayrollComponent.DuplicatePayrollComponentCommand.NewCode
member.summary: Unique code for the new component. Max 20 chars, uppercase.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DuplicatePayrollComponent.DuplicatePayrollComponentCommand.NewName
member.summary: Display name for the new component. Max 200 chars.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.DuplicatePayrollComponent.DuplicatePayrollComponentCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles . Clones all non-system-flag settings from the source component into a new entity.
Initialises the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.TogglePayrollComponentActive.TogglePayrollComponentActiveCommand
member.summary: Command to activate or deactivate a payroll component. System components cannot be deactivated — the handler returns a failure result.
member.param: Primary key of the component to toggle.
true to activate; false to deactivate. System components cannot be set to false.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.TogglePayrollComponentActive.TogglePayrollComponentActiveCommand.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Command to activate or deactivate a payroll component. System components cannot be deactivated — the handler returns a failure result.
member.param: Primary key of the component to toggle.
true to activate; false to deactivate. System components cannot be set to false.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.TogglePayrollComponentActive.TogglePayrollComponentActiveCommand.Id
member.summary: Primary key of the component to toggle.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.TogglePayrollComponentActive.TogglePayrollComponentActiveCommand.SetActive
member.summary: true to activate; false to deactivate. System components cannot be set to false.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.TogglePayrollComponentActive.TogglePayrollComponentActiveCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles . Delegates activate/deactivate to the domain entity, which enforces system component protection.
Initialises the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand
member.summary: Command to update an existing payroll component. System components have restricted fields — only name and display order can be changed.
member.param: Primary key of the component to update.
Updated display name. Max 200 chars.
Updated classification (restricted for system components).
Updated calculation method (restricted for system components).
Updated dollar amount or percentage.
Updated formula expression.
Updated taxability flag.
Updated FNPF applicability flag.
Updated display order.
Updated description. Max 500 chars.

member.summary: Command to update an existing payroll component. System components have restricted fields — only name and display order can be changed.
member.param: Primary key of the component to update.
Updated display name. Max 200 chars.
Updated classification (restricted for system components).
Updated calculation method (restricted for system components).
Updated dollar amount or percentage.
Updated formula expression.
Updated taxability flag.
Updated FNPF applicability flag.
Updated display order.
Updated description. Max 500 chars.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.Id
member.summary: Primary key of the component to update.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.ComponentName
member.summary: Updated display name. Max 200 chars.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.ComponentType
member.summary: Updated classification (restricted for system components).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Updated calculation method (restricted for system components).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.CalculationValue
member.summary: Updated dollar amount or percentage.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.Formula
member.summary: Updated formula expression.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.IsTaxable
member.summary: Updated taxability flag.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.IsFnpfApplicable
member.summary: Updated FNPF applicability flag.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Updated display order.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommand.Description
member.summary: Updated description. Max 500 chars.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommandHandler
member.summary:
Handles .
Steps:
Verify permission.
Load entity — throws if missing.
Verify company access (prevents cross-company tampering).
Delegate update to the domain entity (enforces system component restrictions).
Persist changes.
Initialises the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommandValidator
member.summary: FluentValidation validator for .

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Commands.UpdatePayrollComponent.UpdatePayrollComponentCommandValidator.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises all validation rules.

member.param: Primary key of the component.

member.summary: Query to retrieve the full details of a single payroll component.
member.param: Primary key of the component.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.GetPayrollComponentByIdQuery.Id
member.summary: Primary key of the component.

member.summary: Handles . Maps the domain entity to a without leaking domain objects to the presentation layer.

member.summary: Initialises the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto
member.summary: Data Transfer Object for a full payroll component detail view. Returned by and displayed in the PayrollComponentFormViewModel edit form.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.Id
member.summary: Primary key.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.CompanyId
member.summary: Owning company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.ComponentCode
member.summary: Unique component code within the company.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.ComponentName
member.summary: Human-readable display name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.ComponentType
member.summary: Component classification.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.ComponentTypeLabel
member.summary: Human-readable component type label.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.CalculationMethod
member.summary: How the value is determined.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.CalculationMethodLabel
member.summary: Human-readable calculation method label.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.CalculationValue
member.summary: Fixed amount or percentage value. Null for Formula and Manual.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.Formula
member.summary: Formula expression string. Null for non-formula components.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.IsTaxable
member.summary: Whether the component contributes to PAYE taxable income.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.IsFnpfApplicable
member.summary: Whether the component contributes to FNPF-applicable gross.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Sort order on payslips.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.Description
member.summary: Optional description.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.IsSystemComponent
member.summary: Whether this is a built-in system component (PAYE, FNPF).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this component is active and included in payroll runs.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.CreatedBy
member.summary: Username who created this record.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.CreatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this record was created.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.ModifiedBy
member.summary: Username of the last modifier. Null if never modified.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentById.PayrollComponentDetailDto.ModifiedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of last modification.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery
member.summary: Query to retrieve a filtered, paginated list of payroll components for a company. Corresponds to the component list grid in Phase05-Configuration.md §9.1.
member.param: The company to retrieve components for.
Optional text search on ComponentCode or ComponentName.
Optional filter by component type. Null = all types.
When true, returns only active components. Default: true.
1-based page number. Default: 1.
Records per page. Default: 25.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType},System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Query to retrieve a filtered, paginated list of payroll components for a company. Corresponds to the component list grid in Phase05-Configuration.md §9.1.
member.param: The company to retrieve components for.
Optional text search on ComponentCode or ComponentName.
Optional filter by component type. Null = all types.
When true, returns only active components. Default: true.
1-based page number. Default: 1.
Records per page. Default: 25.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.CompanyId
member.summary: The company to retrieve components for.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.SearchTerm
member.summary: Optional text search on ComponentCode or ComponentName.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.ComponentTypeFilter
member.summary: Optional filter by component type. Null = all types.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.ActiveOnly
member.summary: When true, returns only active components. Default: true.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.PageNumber
member.summary: 1-based page number. Default: 1.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQuery.PageSize
member.summary: Records per page. Default: 25.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQueryHandler
member.summary: Handles . Applies search, type filter, and pagination server-side via SQL Server.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.GetPayrollComponentListQueryHandler.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService)
member.summary: Initialises the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto
member.summary: Lightweight DTO for rendering a row in the Payroll Components list grid. Contains only the fields shown in the list columns per Phase05-Configuration.md §9.1.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.Id
member.summary: Primary key.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.ComponentCode
member.summary: Unique component code.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.ComponentName
member.summary: Display name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.ComponentType
member.summary: Component type (Earning, Deduction, Allowance, Benefit, Statutory).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.ComponentTypeLabel
member.summary: Human-readable component type label for display.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.CalculationMethod
member.summary: Calculation method (Fixed, Percentage, Formula, Manual).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.CalculationMethodLabel
member.summary: Human-readable calculation method label for display.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.IsTaxable
member.summary: Whether this component contributes to PAYE taxable income.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.IsFnpfApplicable
member.summary: Whether this component contributes to FNPF-applicable gross.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.DisplayOrder
member.summary: Sort order on payslips.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.IsSystemComponent
member.summary: Whether this is a built-in system component.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollComponents.Queries.GetPayrollComponentList.PayrollComponentSummaryDto.IsActive
member.summary: Whether this component is currently active.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollRuns.Queries.GetPayrollRunById.PayrollRunDetailDto
member.summary: Detailed DTO for a payroll run, containing its computed employees snapshots and status rules.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollRuns.Queries.GetPayrollRunById.PayrollRunEmployeeDto
member.summary: DTO representing calculated employee records and calculation traces.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollRuns.Queries.GetPayrollRunById.PayrollRunLineItemDto
member.summary: DTO representing individual calculation components.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.PayrollRuns.Queries.GetPayrollRunList.PayrollRunSummaryDto
member.summary: Lightweight DTO representing a payroll run header summary.

member.summary: MediatR query to perform ranked fuzzy search across indexed enterprise entities.

member.summary: MediatR query to perform ranked fuzzy search across indexed enterprise entities.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.Search.Queries.SearchQueryHandler
member.summary: Handler for .

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Features.Search.Queries.SearchQueryHandler.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ISearchService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the handler.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.CalculationResultSnapshot
member.summary: Output data structure holding the results of in-memory payroll calculation.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.CalculatedEmployeeResult
member.summary: Computed employee output snapshot.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.CalculatedLineItemResult
member.summary: Computed line item result.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollComponentService
member.summary: Application service interface for managing payroll components. Acts as the orchestration layer between WPF ViewModels and MediatR CQRS handlers.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollComponentService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a detailed view of a payroll component by ID.
member.param: The component primary key.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A result containing the component details.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollComponentService.GetListAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.ComponentType},System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a filtered, paginated list of payroll component summaries.
member.param: The company identifier.
Optional search text.
Optional component type filter.
Whether to return active components only.
1-based page number.
Page size.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A result containing the paginated summaries.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollComponentService.ToggleActiveAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Activates or deactivates a payroll component.
member.param: The component identifier.
Whether to activate or deactivate.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A result representing success or failure.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollComponentService.DuplicateAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a duplicate clone of a payroll component.
member.param: The source component ID to clone.
Alphanumeric code for the new component.
Display name for the new component.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A result containing the new component's ID.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollComponentService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a payroll component.
member.param: The component identifier.
Cancellation token.
member.returns: A result representing success or failure.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService
member.summary: Application service layer for payroll run orchestrations. Maps presentation calls to CQRS MediatR handlers under database transactions.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches detailed payroll run details, containing non-superseded employees lists.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.GetListAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency},System.Nullable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollRunStatus},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches paginated payroll runs.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.CreateAsync(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,FijiPayroll.Domain.Enumerations.PayrollFrequency,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new payroll run header.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.CalculateAsync(System.Int32,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the run calculations under concurrency safety checks. Idempotency requestId is propagated.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.ResetAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resets the run calculations. Strictly non-chaining.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.ApproveAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Approves the run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.PostAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Posts the run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.IPayrollRunService.AdminOverrideLockAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Forced recovery of stuck locks by administrator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollCalculationEngine
member.summary: Stateless pure calculation orchestrator. Contains NO database access or persistence triggers. Executes calculations entirely in-memory using PayrollExecutionContext snapshots.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollCalculationEngine.Calculate(FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext)
member.summary: Executes the payroll run calculations on the immutable context snapshot, returning the results snapshot.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollComponentService
member.summary: Orchestration service implementing . Translates ViewModel service calls into MediatR CQRS commands and queries, managing database transaction boundaries.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollComponentService.#ctor(MediatR.IMediator,FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.
member.param: The MediatR mediator instance.
The Unit of Work instance for transaction boundaries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext
member.summary: Immutable, thread-safe in-memory context representing the exact execution state for a payroll run. Enforces immutability via init-only properties and read-only lists.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext.Employees
member.summary: Snapshots of employees to compute, ordered by EmployeeId at database level.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext.TaxRules
member.summary: Active tax bracket snapshots matching the requested tax version.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext.Components
member.summary: Active payroll component definitions at calculation time.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.EmployeeSnapshot
member.summary: Immutable snapshot of employee details.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.EmployeeSnapshot.ComponentOverrides
member.summary: Component overrides (manual entries) specifically for this pay period.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.EmployeeComponentOverrideSnapshot
member.summary: Immutable snapshot of employee component overrides.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollComponentSnapshot
member.summary: Immutable snapshot of active components configuration.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContractValidator
member.summary: Hardened execution validator validating execution contracts before engine calculation starts.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContractValidator.Validate(FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext)
member.summary: Validates the structure and values of the context to ensure mathematical and audit determinism.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollRunService
member.summary: Service coordinating transactions and forwarding presentations calls to CQRS.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollSnapshotHasher
member.summary: Hashing utility that is the ONLY valid source for snapshot hash generation in the system. Generates deterministic SHA-256 hash using sorted datasets to ensure audit compliance.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollSnapshotHasher.GenerateHash(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.Application.Services.EmployeeSnapshot},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollComponentSnapshot})
member.summary: Computes a deterministic hash of the payroll execution input configurations.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollValidationService
member.summary: Service validating the input execution context before triggering the payroll run calculation. Enforces statutory completeness constraints (TIN, FNPF numbers, non-negative salaries, etc.).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollValidationService.Validate(FijiPayroll.Application.Services.PayrollExecutionContext)
member.summary: Validates the execution context. Throws an exception or returns a list of validation errors.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.ResetOperationContext
member.summary: Execution context wrapper to track ongoing reset operations across handlers.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Application.Services.ResetOperationContext.IsResetting
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the current execution thread is resetting a payroll run.
